title: • Redemption is difficult but possible.
content:
• Redemption is difficult but possible.
• Re-entering a faction comes with new restrictions.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures betrayal has consequences but doesn’t end a student’s progress.
✔ Allows players to repair relationships and change their path.
✔ Prevents exiles from feeling permanent & frustrating.

📜 4. Fate Mechanics – Preordained Destinies for Certain Players

📜 At the start of the game, some players may secretly be assigned a fate they cannot escape.

✔ Examples of Secret Fates:
• The Doomed Betrayer → This player will inevitably betray their faction, even if they resist.
• The Chosen Redeemer → This player will be forced into a heroic redemption arc.
• The Cursed Fool → This player will always suffer negative consequences from risky actions.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 486 (chunk 486/555)
